preamble: Affrication of alveolar fricative [s] to affricate [ts], often occurring as word-initial or post-nasal strengthening (fortition).

languageExamples.note: Commonly seen in word-initial positions or following nasals in various languages.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
